title: Village Farms International Advances New Product Innovation in the Dutch Market
text: Village Farms International announced the launch of 10 new product offerings in the Netherlands through its wholly-owned subsidiary Leli Holland, introducing innovative formats tailored to Dutch market preferences. Village Farms holds one of 10 licenses permitting it to legally produce and distribute recreational cannabis in the Netherlands. Phase I facility in Drachten has been operating at full capacity since mid-2025, with products represented in 91% of participating coffeeshops. Company expects to commence all operations at Phase II facility in Netherlands during Q2 and ramp to full capacity by end of 2026. Once operating at full capacity, Phase II facility expected to quintuple total Netherlands production to approximately 10 metric tonnes annually. Company exports medical cannabis from EU GMP certified facility in Canada to international markets including Germany, UK, Israel, Australia, New Zealand. Village Farms believes it is largest exporter of medical cannabis to Europe with three of top five leading cultivars in Germany.
